name: Rice with Artichokes
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the artichokes by trimming and removing any choke; slice very thin.
2. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the artichoke slices to the skillet and season with salt and pepper.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for approximately 5 minutes until lightly browned.
5. Lower the heat to medium and continue cooking, stirring often, another 10 minutes.
6. Bring 3 cups of cold water (with 1 tsp salt) to a boil in a saucepan.
7. Add the rice and cook, covered, for 12 to 15 minutes until tender.
8. Stir the cooked rice into the skillet with artichokes and combine well.
9. Serve: 6 servings
